2312430.name: Makato: Your Fantasy Shop
2312430.description:
Welcome to Makato! Here you can fulfill your dream of managing your very own shop for adventurers.

Sell goods to earn money, expand your shop, send out your adventurers to get new goods, and combine them to powerful weapons, armors, potions and more. You want to offer a broad spectrum of equipment, tools and other goods to your customers? You want to specialize in selling equipment for powerful warriors? No problem! It's your shop and your choice how you want to run it.

Build the shop of your dreams


You're the owner so you decide how your shop should look. Add more shelves and tables to place more goods. Design a room for each category of goods. Decorate the shop to attract more customers.

Expand your shop


You ran out of space? You want to display more goods at once? No problem! Just expand your shop and acquire more space. The city Thorek has enough space so go and earn enough money and expand your shop.


Hire craftsmen to create high quality goods


You don't have to make all by yourself. Get some help from the local folks and hire them. You'd be surprised how many specialists live in Thorek. Build them a place where they can perform their crafts, and tell them what you need.
